name: promote
description: End-to-end product promotion strategy with verified-claims fact-check. v1.3.0 introduces: (1) Verified Claims Ledger phase P1.5 — extract factual claims from intake into CSV, user validates in 15 min, prevents operator hallucinations downstream ; (2) Quality Gate #7 (factual claims check) + #8 (reader-honesty) — every produced post is fact-checked against the ledger and audited for reader-first ratio ≥70% ; (3) Output schema split — content/posts/{slug}.md = pure copy-paste-ready content, content/posts/.meta/{slug}.yaml = full metadata audit ; (4) Anti-fabrication contract binding on all internal prompts ; (5) Aggressive trim P3 — Geo-Plan + Rumelt-Aval cut/opt-in, instrumentation reduced to top-3 tripwires, calendar 14d-then-outline (saves ~25% tokens P3). 2 entry points exposed (promote-strategist + promote-content-batcher) backed by 37 internal prompts.

promote_home.title: Campaigns directory
promote_home.description: Where promote artifacts (campaigns) are written. Resolution order: 1) $PROMOTE_HOME env var, 2) ./campaigns/ relative to cwd (default), 3) ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/campaigns/ fallback if cwd is not writable.
